#  Apache Flink ML 2.1.0 Release Announcement
July 12, 2022 - Zhipeng Zhang Dong Lin
The Apache Flink community is excited to announce the release of Flink ML 2.1.0! This release focuses on improving Flink ML’s infrastructure, such as Pytho…
